title: Basic Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the World Health Organisation for the Provision of Technical Advisory Assistance to the Trust, Non-Self-Governing and other Territories for whose international relations the United Kingdom Government are responsible, signed at Geneva on February 7, 1952 together with the Protocol to the Basic Agreement signed at Copenhagen, November 18, 1964
subject: WORLD HEALTH ORGANISATION (WHO)
